emails.subject: Re: Confidentiaility Agreements regarding enovate
emails.body: Kay I believe this was brought on by the most recent push to wrap up more loose ends, particularly breaking out risk books to individual traders. As such, we need to get a few things done. Those that impact you, or anyone else you direct me to, are: 1-Appointments 2-A CA for all persons working on behalf of enovate. This is meant to be signed by both Peoples and Enron employees and is meant to prevent dissemination of confidential information outside of each respective parent organization. Ed Hearn prepared another CA for enovate recently and I could ask him to work on this if you would like. Just let me know. I have a few other things, but I am being yelled at to come to a meeting. Thanks Gregg Kay Mann 02/01/2001 07:05 AM

emails.subject: Re: Confidentiaility Agreements regarding enovate
emails.body: Re: Confidentiaility Agreements regarding enovate Hey there. I'm back in the saddle again. I'll get crackin' Kay

emails.subject: Re: Confidentiaility Agreements regarding enovate
emails.body: Kay This CA covered the audit aspect of enovate. Were you envisioning that this would also cover the individuals in enovate or will there be a separate CA that both Enron and Peoples employees will sign? If there will be a separate CA, can you give me an ETA? I need to get something to John Nassos to review prior to delivering it to the enovate people. Thanks Gregg Kay Mann 02/08/2001 02:43 PM

emails.subject: RE: Confidentiaility Agreements regarding enovate
emails.body: Good timing. You mentioned that there were a couple of things you thought should be added to the "employee/consultant" form. Could you email me the topics so that I can take a look and make changes. Once again I expect to be on an endless conference call, but I can work while I talk. Thanks, Kay Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 04/18/2001 06:45 AM j.nassos@pecorp.com on 04/17/2001 07:12:57 PM

emails.subject: RE: Confidentiaility Agreements regarding enovate
emails.body: Kay where does this stand? Enron accounting was notified on Wednesday that the audit would be taking place. We need this in place prior to the start of the audit. Also, what about the individual CA's. Thanks Gregg Forwarded by Gregg Penman/Corp/Enron on 04/20/2001 09:47 AM j.nassos@pecorp.com 04/17/2001 07:12 PM

emails.subject: RE: Confidentiaility Agreements regarding enovate
emails.body: I have my CA expert (Kathleen Carnahan) is working on it now. Kay
